config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([ event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:CTSCustomer { CTSCustID: event.after.CTSCustID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after ON MATCH SET n = event.after WITH n, event MERGE (s:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.after.SubscriberID}) MERGE (n)-[r:BELONG_TO_SUB]->(s) ON CREATE SET r.CreatedDate = datetime() MERGE (si:Site {SiteID: event.after.SiteID}) ON CREATE SET si.Site = event.after.Site MERGE (n)-[rs:BELONG_TO_SITE]->(si) ON CREATE SET rs.CreatedDate = datetime() MERGE (st:StaticList {ItemID: event.after.CustStatusID, ListID: 1}) MERGE (n)-[r2:HAS_STATUS]->(st) ON CREATE SET r2.CreatedDate = datetime() RETURN COUNT(*)' ,event.op = 'u','MERGE (n:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID }) SET n = event.after WITH n, event OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[ro:BELONG_TO_SUB]->(s:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.before.SubscriberID}) DELETE ro WITH n,event OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[rso:BELONG_TO_SITE]->(si:Site {SiteID: event.before.SiteID}) DELETE rso WITH n,event OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r2o:HAS_STATUS]->(st:StaticList {ItemID: event.before.CustStatusID, ListID: 1}) DELETE r2o WITH n,event MERGE (s:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.after.SubscriberID}) MERGE (n)-[rn:BELONG_TO_SUB]->(s) ON CREATE SET rn.CreatedDate = datetime() MERGE (si:Site {SiteID: event.after.SiteID}) MERGE (n)-[rs:BELONG_TO_SITE]->(si) ON CREATE SET rs.CreatedDate = datetime() MERGE (st:StaticList {ItemID: event.after.CustStatusID, ListID: 1}) MERGE (n)-[r2n:HAS_STATUS]->(st) ON CREATE SET r2n.CreatedDate = datetime() RETURN COUNT(*)',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID }) DETACH DELETE n'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
